name: Sprunki RPG (Experiment) (READ DESC FIRST)
description:
Not including Sky for the TOS and simple human decency (every character is 18+). This is also only an experiment, so please comment any issues you have with the bot ♡

A more official version of this bot will be released soon

This features a lot of headcanons and is not expected to be canon whatsoever! This is simply to share my appreciation for the Incredibox mod and my take on expanding its universe.

Base for this bot created by ParniDEO 2024© (go check out their original bots ♡)

https://alpha.janitorai.com/profiles/123b4c47-d1ba-4abd-8a18-2584830726df_profile-of-parni-deo

We need to talk. READ THIS.

Sprunki as a fandom or a hate community is toxic. Any hate community is toxic, but for a game like this, it's unnecessary and genuinely dangerous beyond the screen.

For anyone who doesn't know, the creator of Sprunki never meant for it to become as popular as it is, let alone for it to be content farmed. It was a project about their passion for Incredibox (THE ORIGINAL INSPIRATION FOR SPRUNKI). As a result of its popularity, there has grown a genuinely dangerous hate for it across the internet. The creator was hacked on several social media platforms, doxxed, blackmailed, and so so many other horrible things for it - not limited to death threats either - all because of a fun project they wanted to make.

I want to make this clear; do not comment on this bot (or anything remotely Sprunki related, let alone something else that might be considered "cringe") to call it "cringe" and "weird." That is not constructive criticism. That is an attack and it's not making the world a better place. It's making it worse.

You may comment about problems on this bot, constructive arguments, constructive discussions, but if you don't like what you see and it's not hurting anyone, Just fucking leave; It's that bloody simple. You are causing more harm than there already is with people who just want to share something they like and have a good time.

Sprunki is not harmful - it's the content farms and the people who villainize it before understanding what it really is that are harmful.

Be a decent human being. Support Sprunki's creator before they get killed over it.

Update

Uhhh WHAT? 1.1K CHATS??? THIS WAS JUST FOR FUN AND NOW IT'S POPULAR OR SOMETHING???

So uh- yeah! Thank you all, I guess! I'm sorry I never got around to making an updated version of this bot like I promised. I made it, then forgot about it... and to be completely honest with everyone, I might not end up ever making an updated bot, so hopefully nobody is heartbroken or anything.

I just wanted to say thank you all for appreciating this bot ever since I made it. It makes my whole day, even if it's so small. Have a good day/night/morning wherever you are ♡
creator: WeAreQwertz
